title: Packet 019 Through Packet 021 Authority Publication And Host Mirror Resync Gate
objective: Publish the bounded local Packet 019, Packet 020, and Packet 021 closure authority set through `C:/APEX Platform`, excluding unrelated `.vercelignore` and any non-authority work, then fast-forward-only synchronize `/home/olares/code/apex` to the resulting governing commit so the clean host mirror carries the Packet 021 planning record before any later host-side test-only execution packet depends on it.
dependency_note: Packet 021 closes by selecting a one-file test-only application-surface trial under `apps/operations-web/tests/browser-shell.smoke.spec.ts` and by deciding that Packet 019 through Packet 021 closure authority must be published and `/home/olares/code/apex` resynchronized before any later host-side execution depends on it. This packet exists to perform that bounded authority publication and host-mirror resync gate without executing the planned test edit.
required_inputs: The Packet 021 ruling that Packet 019 through Packet 021 closure authority must be published before any later host-side test-only execution opens
The Packet 019, Packet 020, and Packet 021 closure handoffs and their governing packet JSON files
The current workstation parent-root state at `C:/APEX Platform`, including unrelated `.vercelignore` that must remain excluded

The current prepared host mirror state at `/home/olares/code/apex` on `clean-main` at `c91bd571dcaab9e7df82682d396ec3a01529b9dc`, where Packet 020 closure and Packet 021 planning authority are still absent
constrained_outputs: A dated execution handoff recording the bounded publication scope, resulting governing commit, and post-sync host-mirror evidence for the Packet 019 through Packet 021 authority publication lane
A recorded statement of whether the host mirror is clean again and now current enough for a later separate host-side test-only execution packet to open
No migration approval, no host runtime mutation, no old-clone mutation, and no widening into AI-services, Gitea/code-hosting, or canonical-hosting work
validation_steps: Review parent-root git status at `C:/APEX Platform` and confirm the proposed publication scope is limited to the Packet 019 through Packet 021 closure handoffs, their governing packet JSON files, and the minimal routing or roadmap authority-state surfaces only.

Exclude unrelated `.vercelignore`, secrets, runtime artifacts, host-only state, service configuration changes, implementation work outside this authority-publication lane, generated artifacts, and any old-clone content.
Create and publish the bounded parent-root commit to the GitHub-canonical repository, recording branch, remote, included paths, and resulting commit hash.

Capture pre-sync `/home/olares/code/apex` branch, remote, commit, cleanliness, and absence or presence evidence for the Packet 020 handoff, Packet 021 JSON, and any included routing or roadmap artifacts without mutating `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform`.
Synchronize `/home/olares/code/apex` to the published commit using a non-destructive fast-forward-only method without force, reset, clean, or remote rewrite.

Capture post-sync evidence that the host mirror is clean again and now contains the included Packet 019 through Packet 021 authority artifacts needed before any later host-side test-only execution opens.

Stop if execution would require migration approval, host runtime mutation, old-clone mutation, service changes, auth or ingress changes, AI-services rollout, Gitea work, canonical-hosting change, force, reset, clean, remote rewrite, inclusion of unrelated parent-root changes in the publication commit, or execution of the planned operations-web smoke-test edit.
sql_permission_note: This packet authorizes bounded parent-root authority publication and fast-forward-only host mirror synchronization only. It does not authorize database writes, host-runtime mutation, old-clone mutation, AI-services rollout, Gitea work, canonical-hosting changes, migration approval, or execution of the planned operations-web smoke-test edit.
closure_note: Complete. Published the bounded Packet 019 through Packet 021 authority set plus the authored Packet 022 JSON in parent-root commit `8f17292d8ebd678717d8a12f2e870828feed055d`, pushed `clean-main`, and fast-forward-only synchronized `/home/olares/code/apex` to that commit with status count `0`. The Packet 022 closure handoff, this completion metadata, the Packet 023 draft, and post-022 routing or roadmap updates are workstation-local post-publication authority drift until a later bounded publication includes them.
next_action: Open only the separate Packet 023 host-side test-only execution lane against `apps/operations-web/tests/browser-shell.smoke.spec.ts` after revalidating `/home/olares/code/apex` remains clean and current. Do not approve migration, mutate runtime, change services, install dependencies, rewrite remotes, force, reset, clean, or mutate the old clone from Packet 022 alone.
